text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios: Some of the issues the U.S. and Iran disagreed on is Iran wanting to control the Strait of Hormuz and enriched uranium stockpiles. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯谈及美国在谈判中提出的方案：我们在此留下了一个非常简单的提议。一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的报价。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Axios：美国和伊朗在一些问题上存在分歧，包括伊朗希望控制霍尔木兹海峡以及浓缩铀库存。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim: The ball is in the United States' court, and Iran is not in a hurry in the negotiations. As long as the United States does not agree to a reasonable deal, there will be no change in the situation of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim：球在美国这边，伊朗在谈判中并不着急。只要美国不同意合理的协议，霍尔木兹海峡的局势就不会有任何改变。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Fun fact: Iranian officials, although they wear suits, never wear ties. After the Iranian revolution, ties were considered a symbol of Western cultural decline, often worn by perpetrators of colonialism and oppression. Not wearing a tie was considered a revolutionary gesture.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 有趣的事实：伊朗官员虽然穿西装，但从不打领带。伊朗革命后，领带被视为西方文化衰落的象征，通常由殖民主义和压迫的肇事者佩戴。不打领带被视为一种革命姿态。

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 Professor Marandi, member of the Iranian delegation: ‘Obviously, the Trump regime wasn’t seriously negotiating’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 伊朗代表团成员马兰迪教授：“显然，特朗普政权并没有认真进行谈判” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇷 NEW: According to another informed source, one of the issues was America’s unwillingness to compel Israel to an immediate ceasefire in Lebanon The U.S. merely convinced Israel to stop strikes in Beirut while ‘gradually expanding’ to include southern Lebanon and the rest of the country. Iran did not agree to this. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇷 最新消息：据另一位知情人士透露，其中一个问题是美国不愿强迫以色列在黎巴嫩立即停火。美国只是说服以色列停止对贝鲁特的袭击，同时“逐步扩大”范围，包括黎巴嫩南部和该国其他地区。伊朗不同意这一点。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: ❗️ Possible Israeli airstrike in Dahyeh
text_zh: ❗️ 达希耶可能发生以色列空袭

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 IRGC-affiliated media Tasnim News Agency says Iran tried to steer talks toward a common framework, but claims U.S. “natural greediness” prevented progress. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162857181786247/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队附属媒体塔斯尼姆通讯社称，伊朗试图将谈判引向一个共同框架，但声称美国的“天生贪婪”阻碍了进展。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162857181786247/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 The US Air Force Two carrying JD Vance departing Islamabad. Witkoff and Kushner are yet to depart. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162645084127270/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 搭载JD·万斯的美国空军二号离开伊斯兰堡。威特科夫和库什纳尚未离开。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043162645084127270/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 US Vice-President JD Vance about the negotiations: "The simple fact is that we need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon." https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043161037592035637/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 美国副总统JD·万斯谈及谈判：“简单的事实是，我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求那些能让他们迅速获得核武器的工具。” https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2043161037592035637/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel At least 6 people were shot and 1 person was killed at a Chick-fil-A in Union Township, New Jersey, officials told RLS Media. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043160711224799450/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 官员告诉RLS Media，新泽西州联合镇的一家Chick-fil-A发生枪击事件，至少6人中枪，1人死亡。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043160711224799450/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to data from MarineTraffic, there appears to have been an uptick in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz in the last 36 hours, with at least 10 ships transiting and 7 more in progress. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043158579612422558/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据MarineTraffic的数据，过去36小时内通过霍尔木兹海峡的交通似乎有所增加，至少有10艘船只通过，另有7艘正在通过。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043158579612422558/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 IRIB report: Twenty-one hours of intensive negotiations have ended without agreement. Such intensive negotiations are unprecedented. The Iranian side entered with clear principles and complete good faith, but with distrust based on the Americans' track record. "The atmosphere of American greed in these talks prevented them from being able to reach an agreement or reach a result or progress." The Iranian delegation's effort was to fully protect the achievements Iranians obtained in the forty-day battle while also reaching an agreement. The hardening of the negotiation process showed itself as American greed became clear. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 IRIB报道：二十一小时的密集谈判在没有达成协议的情况下结束。如此密集的谈判是前所未有的。伊朗方面带着明确的原则和完全的诚意进入谈判，但基于美国人的过往记录，存在不信任感。“这些谈判中弥漫的美国贪婪氛围，使他们无法达成协议，也无法取得成果或进展。”伊朗代表团的努力是在充分保护伊朗人在四十天战斗中取得的成就的同时，达成一项协议。随着美国贪婪的显现，谈判过程的强硬也随之显现。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 Civilian residents who were freed from Ukrainian captivity have returned to the Kursk region, reported governor Alexander Khinshtein. The arrivals were accommodated in the Civil Defense Shelter where medical personnel are working with them. Each will be issued a regional certificate for 30,000 rubles for urgent needs, and they will also be assisted in restoring their documents and obtaining social payments, noted the governor. The Kursk residents who returned from captivity will quickly receive housing certificates, reported the head of the Sudzha district Spiridonov. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 据州长亚历山大·欣斯坦报道，从乌克兰俘虏中获释的平民已返回库尔斯克地区。抵达者被安置在民防避难所，医务人员正在那里为他们工作。州长指出，每人将获得一份3万卢布的地区证书用于紧急需求，并将协助他们恢复证件和获得社会救济金。苏贾区区长斯皮里多诺夫报告称，返回的库尔斯克居民将很快收到住房证书。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Vance is working and the orange clown is with the Secretary of State Rubio at a UFC event
text_zh: 万斯在工作，而那个橙色小丑正与国务卿卢比奥在UFC赛事现场

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ JD Vance is on his way back to the US
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ JD·万斯正在返回美国的途中

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 NEW: J.D. Vance leaves Islamabad IRIB: ‘The American enemy, which is vile, wicked and dishonest — attempted to achieve on the negotiating table what it could not achieve through war. Among these demands are handing over enriched uranium and opening the Strait of Hormuz without confirmed Iranian sovereignty over it. Iran has decided to reject these terms and continue the sacred defense of its fatherland by any means necessary, military or diplomatic. ’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 最新消息：JD·万斯离开伊斯兰堡 IRIB：“卑鄙、邪恶且不诚实的美国敌人，试图在谈判桌上实现其在战争中无法实现的目标。这些要求包括移交浓缩铀和在没有确认伊朗主权的情况下开放霍尔木兹海峡。伊朗已决定拒绝这些条款，并以任何必要的方式，无论是军事还是外交手段，继续捍卫其祖国的神圣防御。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Vice President JD Vance is now en route back to Washington following unsuccessful trilateral talks between the U.S., Pakistan, and Iran. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043155763229528461/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在美国、巴基斯坦和伊朗之间的三方会谈失败后，美国副总统JD·万斯目前正在返回华盛顿的途中。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043155763229528461/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The US negotiators have departed Pakistan after talks with Iran fell apart. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043155728215547931/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在与伊朗的会谈破裂后，美国谈判代表已离开巴基斯坦。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043155728215547931/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Per the White House press pool, U.S. Vice President JD Vance has now boarded Air Force Two and is departing Islamabad, Pakistan following unsuccessful talks between the U.S. and Iran on resolving the conflict in the Middle East. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043154752276422738/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据白宫新闻团消息，在美国与伊朗就解决中东冲突的会谈失败后，美国副总统JD·万斯已登上空军二号，离开巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043154752276422738/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Despite direct support from U.S. Vice President JD Vance and the Trump Administration, almost all polls show Viktor Orbán significantly losing his upcoming bid for Prime Minister of Hungary, with traders on Polymarket pitting his chances at less than 30%. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043151495382651348/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 尽管得到了美国副总统JD·万斯和特朗普政府的直接支持，但几乎所有的民调都显示维克托·欧尔班在即将到来的匈牙利总理竞选中大幅落后，Polymarket上的交易员认为他获胜的机会不到30%。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043151495382651348/photo/1 推文

text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗官方媒体：伊朗没有下一轮会谈的计划。推文

text_zh: Open Source Intel 这是副总统JD·万斯的完整讲话，宣布美伊会谈在没有达成协议的情况下结束。由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043149739672138227/video/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺: ❗️ We leave here with a very simple proposal, a method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it" - JD Vance ⚡ The American delegation has left Islamabad. @AussieCossack
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 🇦🇺AussieCossack🇷🇺：❗️ 我们在此留下了一个非常简单的提议，一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的报价。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受” - JD·万斯 ⚡ 美国代表团已离开伊斯兰堡。@AussieCossack

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance’s remarks are over, they lasted less than 4 minutes. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance has boarded Air Force Two enroute back to Washington D.C. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯的讲话结束了，持续了不到4分钟。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯已登上空军二号，正在返回华盛顿特区的途中。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian Tasnim Report (from negotiations in Islamabad): Iranian team (led by Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf, Abbas Araqchi, and Ali Bagheri, plus experts) held nearly 21 hours of intensive talks. They firmly defended Iran's fundamental rights in political, military, and peaceful nuclear fields . Successfully blocked U.S. excessive demands, including concessions on the Strait of Hormuz and removal of nuclear materials (what the U.S. could not achieve on the battlefield). Iran proposed initiatives for a common framework, but U.S. "greedy mindset" prevented rationality and agreement.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗塔斯尼姆报道（来自伊斯兰堡谈判）：伊朗团队（由穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫、阿巴斯·阿拉格希和阿里·巴盖里以及专家组成）进行了近21小时的密集会谈。他们坚定地捍卫了伊朗在政治、军事和和平核领域的根本权利。成功阻止了美国的过度要求，包括在霍尔木兹海峡和移除核材料方面的让步（这是美国在战场上无法实现的）。伊朗提出了共同框架的倡议，但美国的“贪婪心态”阻碍了理性和协议的达成。

text: Open Source Intel Shortly after finishing speech, U.S. Vice President JD Vance left the venue. U.S. Vice President JD Vance: "The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America. So, we go back to the U.S. having not come to an agreement. They have chosen not to accept our terms." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 演讲结束后不久，美国副总统JD·万斯离开了会场。美国副总统JD·万斯：“坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更坏的消息。所以，我们回到美国，没有达成协议。他们选择不接受我们的条款。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iranian state media: The Iranian team sought to push the American side toward a common framework, but the American maximalist approach prevented them from acting rationally and realistically. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗官方媒体：伊朗团队试图推动美方走向共同框架，但美国的极端主义做法阻碍了他们采取理性和现实的行动。推文

text: Open Source Intel JD Vance says U.S.-Iran talks end with no agreement. U.S. Vice President JD Vance: "The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America. So, we go back to the U.S. having not come to an agreement. They have chosen not to accept our terms." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel JD·万斯称美伊会谈在没有达成协议的情况下结束。美国副总统JD·万斯：“坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更坏的消息。所以，我们回到美国，没有达成协议。他们选择不接受我们的条款。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Instant News Alerts Vice President JD Vance says talks between the U.S. and Iran have ended after 21 hours without reaching an agreement. (AP) tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts 副总统JD·万斯表示，美国和伊朗之间的会谈在进行了21小时后结束，未能达成协议。（美联社）推文

text: ELINT News RT @JenGriffinFNC : “We have given them the final and best offer,” Vance tells reporters before leaving Islamabad after 21 hours of negotiations. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News RT @JenGriffinFNC ：“我们已经给了他们最终且最好的报价，”万斯在21小时的谈判后离开伊斯兰堡前告诉记者。推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: US Vice President JD Vance says they presented Iran their final and best offer tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，他们向伊朗提出了最终且最好的报价。推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: Mr. Vice President, how often did you communicate with President Trump throughout the negotiations? JD Vance: Obviously, we were talking to the President consistently. I don’t know how many times we talked to him, a half dozen times, a dozen times over the past 21 hours. We obviously also talked to Admiral Cooper, to Pete, to Marco, to the entire national security team. We talked to Scott Bessent a number of times. So look, we were constantly in communication with the team because we were negotiating in good faith. And we leave here, and we leave here with a very simple proposal, a method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We’ll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 记者：副总统先生，在整个谈判过程中，您与特朗普总统沟通了多少次？JD·万斯：显然，我们一直在与总统保持联系。我不知道我们和他谈了多少次，在过去的21小时里，大概有六次，或者十二次。我们显然也与库珀海军上将、皮特、马可以及整个国家安全团队进行了交谈。我们与斯科特·贝森特谈过几次。所以，我们一直在与团队沟通，因为我们是在真诚地进行谈判。我们离开这里，带着一个非常简单的提议，一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的报价。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。推文

text: Faytuks News Vance: "We leave here with a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it." https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2043142997550805043/video/1 tweet

text: Back to war it is..
text_zh: 回到战争状态了..

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 US Vice President JD Vance says negotiations failed: This is bad news, more so for Iran than for America. So we go back to the US having not come to an agreement. We gave them our Red Lines and they decided not to accept our terms, this is our best and final offer
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国副总统JD·万斯表示谈判失败：这是一个坏消息，对伊朗来说比对美国来说更甚。所以我们回到美国，没有达成协议。我们给了他们我们的红线，他们决定不接受我们的条款，这是我们最好且最终的报价

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Negotiations between Iran and the United States in Islamabad, Pakistan have ended Tasnim's correspondent at the negotiation site: 🔹 The negotiations between the Iranian and American teams ended a few minutes ago, and the two sides have not reached an agreement for now due to U.S. greed and ambitions .
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗和美国在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的谈判已经结束 塔斯尼姆通讯社驻谈判现场记者：🔹 伊朗和美国团队之间的谈判在几分钟前结束，由于美国的贪婪和野心，双方目前尚未达成协议。

text: 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 We have not reached an agreement, and I think it's bad news for Iran, much more than for the US - Vance 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 我们没有达成协议，我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息 - 万斯 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance’s remarks are over, they lasted less than 4 minutes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯谈及美国在谈判中提出的方案：我们在此留下了一个非常简单的提议。一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的报价。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯的讲话结束了，持续了不到4分钟。@wfwitness

text: Until you accept our terms and concede
text_zh: 直到你们接受我们的条款并让步

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance om what the U.S. needs to see to from Iran on the nuclear program: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 U.S. Vice President Vance on what the U.S. proposed during negotiations: We leave here a very simple proposal. A method of understanding that is our final and best offer. We'll see if the Iranians accept it. Thank you. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈及美国需要伊朗在核计划方面看到什么：我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求那些能让他们迅速获得核武器的工具……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美国副总统万斯谈及美国在谈判中提出的方案：我们在此留下了一个非常简单的提议。一种理解方式，这是我们最终且最好的报价。我们将看看伊朗人是否接受。谢谢。@wfwitness

text: Nothing can or should deter us from fulfilling our great historic mission toward our beloved homeland and the noble Iranian civilization. The Islamic Republic of Iran is determined to use all tools, including diplomacy, to secure national interests and protect the country’s welfare. Over the past 24 hours, discussions have covered various dimensions of the core issues under negotiation, including the Strait of Hormuz, the nuclear file, war reparations, sanctions relief, and a complete end to the war against Iran and in the region. The success of this diplomatic process depends on the seriousness and good faith of the other side, refraining from excessive demands and unlawful conditions, and recognizing Iran’s legitimate rights and interests. We express our appreciation to the government and the warm and honorable people of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan for hosting the talks and for their good offices in advancing this process.
text_zh: 没有什么能够或应该阻止我们履行对我们挚爱的祖国和高贵的伊朗文明的历史使命。伊朗伊斯兰共和国决心利用一切工具，包括外交，来保障国家利益并保护国家福祉。在过去的24小时里，讨论涵盖了谈判核心问题的各个方面，包括霍尔木兹海峡、核档案、战争赔款、制裁减免以及彻底结束针对伊朗和该地区的战争。这一外交进程的成功取决于对方的诚意和严肃态度，不提出过分要求和非法条件，并承认伊朗的合法权利和利益。我们对巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国政府及其热情、光荣的人民主办此次会谈并为推进这一进程所提供的斡旋表示感谢。

text: Iran Foreign ministry spokesperson @IRIMFA_SPOX issued the following : Diplomacy, for us, is a continuation of the sacred struggle of those who defend the land of Iran. We have not forgotten—and will not forget—the experience of U.S. breaches of trust and ill intent. Just as we will not forgive the heinous crimes committed by them and the Zionist regime during the second and third imposed wars. Today was a long and demanding day for the delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran in Islamabad. Intensive negotiations, which began on Saturday morning with Pakistan’s good offices and mediation, have continued uninterrupted until now, with numerous messages and draft texts exchanged between the two sides. Iranian negotiators are employing all their capabilities, experience, and knowledge to safeguard Iran’s rights and interests. The heavy loss of our leaders, loved ones, and compatriots has only strengthened our resolve to pursue the interests and rights of the Iranian people.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人 @IRIMFA_SPOX 发表了以下声明：对我们来说，外交是那些保卫伊朗土地的人们神圣斗争的延续。我们没有忘记，也不会忘记美国背信弃义和恶意企图的经历。正如我们不会原谅他们和犹太复国主义政权在第二次和第三次强加战争中所犯下的滔天罪行一样。今天对于伊朗伊斯兰共和国驻伊斯兰堡代表团来说是漫长而艰巨的一天。从周六早上开始，在巴基斯坦的斡旋和调解下，密集谈判一直不间断地持续到现在，双方交换了大量的消息和文本草案。伊朗谈判代表正在利用他们所有的能力、经验和知识来维护伊朗的权利和利益。我们领导人、亲人和同胞的沉重损失只会加强我们追求伊朗人民利益和权利的决心。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰U.S. Vice President Vance said that a deal still could not be reached after 21 hours of talks with Iran, which he claims is bad news for Iran. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance om what the U.S. needs to see to from Iran on the nuclear program: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon. We haven't seen that yet. We hope that we will. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯表示，在与伊朗进行了21小时的会谈后仍无法达成协议，他称这对伊朗来说是坏消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯谈及美国需要伊朗在核计划方面看到什么：我们需要看到他们做出明确承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求那些能让他们迅速获得核武器的工具。我们还没有看到这一点。我们希望我们会看到。@wfwitness

text: ❗️ U.S. Vice President JD Vance has said that no deal was made during the 21+ hours of negotiations... ...saying “we could just not get to a situation where the Iranians were willing to accept our terms.” He restated that the Iranians were unwilling to shift left or right on key U.S. demands, including their nuclear program.
text_zh: ❗️ 美国副总统JD·万斯表示，在21个多小时的谈判中没有达成任何协议……他说“我们无法达成伊朗愿意接受我们条款的情况。”他重申，伊朗人不愿在包括核计划在内的关键美国要求上做出任何让步。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CBS: J.D. Vance is expected to speak at a press conference in Islamabad shortly. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 U.S. Vice President Vance said that a deal still could not be reached after 21 hours of talks with Iran, which he claims is bad news for Iran. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement. And I think that's bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the US. So, we go back to the US having not come to an agreement ... they have chosen not to accept our terms. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CBS：预计JD·万斯很快将在伊斯兰堡举行新闻发布会。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美国副总统万斯表示，在与伊朗进行了21小时的会谈后仍无法达成协议，他称这对伊朗来说是坏消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议。我认为这对伊朗来说比对美国来说是更坏的消息。所以，我们回到美国，没有达成协议……他们选择不接受我们的条款。@wfwitness

text: 🇶🇦 The Malice of Al Jazeera Yesterday, Al Jazeera released a video of deceptive editing to portray Iran as deliberately targeting civilians in Qatar. In the first minute the network combined two different clips — a distant impact and a closer view — to suggest a direct missile strike on residential areas, creating a misleading impression of intentional civilian targeting . The footage actually shows missile booster, not a precision attack.
text_zh: 🇶🇦 半岛电视台的恶意 昨天，半岛电视台发布了一段具有欺骗性剪辑的视频，将伊朗描绘成故意针对卡塔尔平民。在第一分钟，该网络结合了两个不同的片段——一次远距离撞击和一次近距离观察——以暗示对居民区进行了直接导弹袭击，造成了故意针对平民的误导性印象。录像实际上显示的是导弹助推器，而不是精确打击。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Donald Trump is currently attending UFC 327 in Miami, Florida and walked out with Dana White. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普目前正在佛罗里达州迈阿密参加UFC 327，并与达纳·怀特一同出场。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. intelligence indicates China is preparing to deliver air defense systems, including MANPADS, to Iran in the coming weeks. The shipments are reportedly being routed through third countries to obscure their origin, and could help Iran replenish…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 CNN: The Chinese Embassy in the U.S. denied that China is preparing to send weapons to Iran. “China has never provided weapons to any party to the conflict; the information in question is untrue. As a responsible major country, China consistently fulfills its international obligations. We urge the U.S. side to refrain from making baseless allegations, maliciously drawing connections, and engaging in sensationalism; we hope that relevant parties will do more to help de-escalate tensions.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳🇮🇷 CNN：美国情报显示，中国准备在未来几周内向伊朗交付防空系统，包括便携式防空导弹系统（MANPADS）。据报道，这些货物正通过第三国转运以掩盖其来源，并可能帮助伊朗补充……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 CNN：中国驻美大使馆否认中国准备向伊朗运送武器。“中国从未向冲突的任何一方提供武器；有关信息是不真实的。作为一个负责任的大国，中国始终履行其国际义务。我们敦促美方停止发表毫无根据的指控、恶意关联和煽动性言论；我们希望有关各方多做有助于缓解紧张局势的事情。” @wfwitness
